overview: A complete hotel management system for Sunder Shanti Hotel — internal staff software for managing rooms, guest bookings, invoices, checkout, payments, and reports with admin/staff role-based access.
features: Room inventory management with status tracking (Available, Occupied, Maintenance)
Walk-in booking system with guest records and advance payment tracking
Checkout with auto-generated professional invoices (printable layout)
Cash and UPI payment recording with partial payment support
Dashboard with live metrics: total rooms, available, occupied, today check-ins, today revenue
Role-based access control: Admin (full access) and Staff (booking and checkout only)
Daily revenue, occupancy, pending payments, and booking history reports
Sunder Shanti Hotel SVG logo and branded warm-toned professional UI
Responsive design for desktop and mobile browser use
No PWA, no service workers — clean standard web application
